modes.purpose: dispatch a reviewer subagent with crisp context, parse structured feedback, act per severity
modes.default_when: phase verify of any workflow opt-in; after major features; before merge

modes.purpose: process review feedback without sycophancy, verify before implementing, push back when wrong
modes.default_when: user pastes review feedback from teammate, GitHub PR comment, or external reviewer

human_approval_required_for: skipping_review_on_critical_change (mode request, only with explicit user override)

fork_policy.mode_request: fork-by-design — the reviewer subagent always runs in context: fork to keep main session clean and the reviewer focused on the diff
fork_policy.mode_receive: no fork — the response happens in the main session because the user is interactive
